name: claude-code-companion
description: The Companion overlay plugin: the working agent authors self-contained HTML artifacts inline, in full context, when a turn earns one; a Stop-hook backstop surfaces one if a substantive turn ends with nothing written. Bespoke HTML tools and health checks included.

plugins.name: companion
plugins.description: The working agent authors self-contained HTML artifacts inline when a turn earns one; a Stop-hook backstop reminds it once if a substantive turn ends with nothing written.
